data.title: shim-refs-check pre-commit hook times out at 5s on larger changesets
data.description: check-shim-refs.sh exceeds the 5s pre-commit timeout when scanning larger diffs. The check passes when given more time (completes in ~10-12s). Workaround: bumped timeout from 5s to 15s in .pre-commit-config.yaml (committed in a5c450d7). Root cause likely: the script scans all files matching plugins/dso/ on every commit rather than only staged files.
